rationale: Secret aliases consumed by file_templates and home_path_overrides are now collected before default environment injection, so they are not leaked as top-level environment variables.
Alias collection now detects {{ alias }} template-string references in addition to from_secret_ref dictionaries.
Top-level bot review summary; the two actionable inline findings it summarized were addressed separately.
Suppressed secret aliases are now removed from inherited base_env before the child process environment is returned.
